# `sunpy-soar`

{{ ci-status }} {{ coverage }}

A sunpy Fido plugin for accessing data in the Solar Orbiter Archive (SOAR).

See the [documentation](https://docs.sunpy.org/projects/soar/) for installation instructions, examples, how to get help and how to contribute.

modules.name: sunpy_soar.tests
documentation: This module contains package tests.

functions.name: sunpy_soar.conftest._hide_parfive_progress
documentation: Set the PARFIVE_HIDE_PROGRESS to hide the parfive progress bar in tests.

modules.name: sunpy_soar
documentation:
``sunpy-soar``
==============

A sunpy FIDO plugin for accessing data in the Solar Orbiter Archive (SOAR).

* Homepage: https://sunpy.org
* Documentation: https://docs.sunpy.org/projects/soar/
* Source Code: https://github.com/sunpy/sunpy-soar

modules.name: sunpy_soar.version
documentation: NOTE: First try _dev.scm_version if it exists and setuptools_scm is installed
This file is not included in muse wheels/tarballs, so otherwise it will
fall back on the generated _version module.

modules.name: sunpy_soar._version
documentation: file generated by setuptools_scm
don't change, don't track in version control

modules.name: sunpy_soar.attrs
documentation: This file defines the net attributes that can be used to search the SOAR.

functions.name: sunpy_soar.attrs.create_or
documentation:
Creator for OR.

Loops through the next level down in the tree and appends the
individual results to a list.

functions.name: sunpy_soar.attrs.create_and
documentation:
Creator for And and other simple attributes.

No walking needs to be done, so simply call the applier function.

functions.name: sunpy_soar.attrs.apply_and
documentation:
Applier for And.

# Parameters

wlk : AttrWalker
and_attr : AttrAnd

> The AND attribute being applied. The individual attributes being
> AND'ed together are accessible with `and_attr.attrs`.

params

: List of search parameters.

classes.name: sunpy_soar.attrs.Product
documentation:
The data product descriptor to search for.

Makes the value passed lower so that it is case insensitive as all
descriptors on the SOAR are now lowercase.

classes.name: sunpy_soar.attrs.SOOP
documentation: The SOOP name to search for.

classes.name: sunpy_soar.attrs.Distance

methods.name: sunpy_soar.attrs.Distance.collides
documentation: Check if the other attribute collides with this attribute.

Specifies the distance range.

Parameters
----------
dist_min : `~astropy.units.Quantity`
    The lower bound of the range.
dist_max : `~astropy.units.Quantity`
    The upper bound of the range.

Notes
-----
The valid units for distance are AU, km, and mm. Any unit directly
convertible to these units is valid input. This class filters the query
by solar distance without relying on a specific distance column.

modules.name: sunpy_soar.client
documentation:
This file defines the SOARClient class which is used to access the Solar
Orbiter Archive (SOAR).

classes.name: sunpy_soar.client.SOARClient

methods.name: sunpy_soar.client.SOARClient.search
documentation:
Query this client for a list of results.

# Parameters

args: `tuple`

: `sunpy.net.attrs` objects representing the query.

kwargs: `dict`

: Any extra keywords to refine the search.
  Unused by this client.

# Returns

A `QueryResponseTable` instance containing the query result.

methods.name: sunpy_soar.client.SOARClient.add_join_to_query
documentation:
Construct the WHERE, FROM, and SELECT parts of the ADQL query.

Parameters
----------
query : list[str]
    List of query items.
data_table : str
    Name of the data table.
instrument_table : str
    Name of the instrument table.

Returns
-------
tuple[str, str, str]
    WHERE, FROM, and SELECT parts of the query.

methods.name: sunpy_soar.client.SOARClient._construct_payload
documentation:
Construct search payload.

Parameters
----------
query : list[str]
    List of query items.

Returns
-------
dict
    Payload dictionary to be sent with the query.

methods.name: sunpy_soar.client.SOARClient._do_search
documentation:
Query the SOAR server with a single query.

Parameters
----------
query : list[str]
    List of query items.

Returns
-------
astropy.table.QTable
    Query results.

methods.name: sunpy_soar.client.SOARClient.fetch
documentation:
Queue a set of results to be downloaded.
`sunpy.net.base_client.BaseClient` does the actual downloading, so we
just have to queue up the `downloader`.

# Parameters

query_results

: Results from a Fido search.

path

: Path to download files to. Must be a format string with a `file`
  field for the filename.

downloader

: Downloader instance used to download data.

kwargs :

: Keyword arguments aren't used by this client.

methods.name: sunpy_soar.client.SOARClient._can_handle_query
documentation:
Check if this client can handle a given Fido query. Checks to see if a
SOAR instrument or product is provided in the query.

Returns
-------
bool
    True if this client can handle the given query.

methods.name: sunpy_soar.client.SOARClient.register_values
documentation:
Register the SOAR specific attributes with Fido.

Returns
-------
dict
    The dictionary containing the values formed into attributes.

methods.name: sunpy_soar.client.SOARClient.load_dataset_values
documentation:
Loads the net attribute values from the JSON file.

Returns
-------
dict
    The dictionary containing the values formed into attributes.

Provides access to Solar Orbiter Archive (SOAR) which provides data for
Solar Orbiter.

References
----------
* `SOAR <https://soar.esac.esa.int/soar/>`__
